title: Shipped both delivery fixes: realpath the hook path + content-matched constraints (record-constraint --match) that survive file churn
context: dec_e0a36efbf5 diagnosed two real delivery gaps end-to-end. This implements and proves both.
decision: FIX 1: toRepoRel (cli/index.ts) now realpath-normalizes both root and abs via a realpathNorm() that resolves the longest existing ancestor (handles a not-yet-created file), so the edit-time hook still delivers under a symlinked root (/tmp, /var, symlinked $HOME) instead of silently emitting 0 bytes. FIX 2: constraints gain an optional `match` regex (ConstraintSchema.match; `hunch record-constraint --match <regex>`). A content-matched invariant is decided by whether an ADDED diff/edit line actually trips the regex — verifiable per commit — so isStrictBlocker is called with stale=false for it: it keeps blocking the real violation across the file's whole life, and stays QUIET on edits that touch scope but don't break the rule (dropped from the direct report → no false positive). Wired through buildCheckReport (commit/CI gate, via analyzeDiff.addedLinesByFile) and blockingInScope (edit-time deny, now passed proposedEditLines). New shared helper src/core/constraintmatch.ts (constraintMatcher compiles defensively — bad regex is inert; contentViolates). Scope-only constraints are unchanged (still staleness-gated).
consequences: Users who want reliable enforcement should record the invariant WITH a content matcher, e.g. record-constraint "never import lodash" --scope src/** --severity blocking --match "lodash" — it then blocks the actual lodash-adding commit/edit regardless of how often the file has changed since, and never fires on innocent edits.

Proven: test/contentmatch.test.ts (4 tests: blocks-when-stale, silent-on-compliant, scope-only-contrast, hook-denies-only-the-violation) + demo/real-world-scenarios.sh runs the BUILT binary through a symlinked-root repo and a churned-file lifecycle (5/5 pass). Full suite 346/347 (1 optional-embedder skip), typecheck clean.
Committed on branch fix/delivery-symlink-and-content-matched-constraints (6568295); not yet merged to main or released.

Schema gained a nullable field with default null — old constraints migrate transparently (Zod default); three internal constraint constructors (correction, synthesis promote, inline-rule capture) set match:null.
